display.name: Fireflies
display.author: prism
display.blurb: A field of fireflies blinking on a warm summer night, soft trails as they drift between visible flashes.

annotation.technical_notes: A custom wave system generates a stream of bioluminescent golden-green particles that multiply and swarm across the screen. Per-pixel warp equations create a fluid, swimming advection field, while a low decay rate in the frame feedback loop preserves the glowing trails. The brightness and density of the particle field modulate dynamically in response to the high-frequency treble and mid-range transients of the audio.
